response.justification: The candidate has roughly 18 years of solid hands-on software development experience across web, backend, and embedded systems, meeting the raw experience minimum, but the trajectory is senior/staff individual contributor product work rather than director-level engineering leadership. There is only recent, light exposure to AI (agent tooling and MCP code generators since 2025) and no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, cloud strategy work, or advising executives and strategic customers — the core of this principal AI-strategy role.
strengths: 18+ years of broad, hands-on engineering experience across many stacks and domains
Founder experience (GISCollective) showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling plus a track record of teaching and public speaking
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products at scale
Career level is senior/staff IC, well below the director-level scope and strategic advisory responsibilities
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy or influencing engineering direction across large organizations

key_factors.factor: Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial background
